assertions.title: Lecture cards show title, topics, and exam relevance

steps.action: Inspect lecture cards on course map
steps.expected: Each card shows title, topics, exam relevance
steps.observed: Cards display: lecture number, title, topics (e.g., 'Number systems, Data representation'), exam relevance (medium/high/low), difficulty, example count

assertions.title: Navigation to lecture detail pages

steps.observed: Clicking lecture card navigated to /examples instead of lecture detail page
Page shows only 'Back to Course Map' link, no lecture content
Page shows section buttons but minimal content, no lecture body

assertions.issues: Lecture cards not properly linked to lecture pages. When clicking a lecture card, app navigates to /examples. Lecture pages themselves render minimal content - only navigation elements without actual lecture body/content.

steps.observed: Lecture cards stack vertically, hamburger menu visible
Cards display in grid layout with 2+ columns
Page renders with light color scheme
Page renders with dark color scheme

assertions.title: Lecture cards have hover/focus states

steps.action: Attempt to hover over lecture card
steps.observed: Hover action blocked by overlay (search dialog triggered)
Navigation inconsistent - page sometimes redirects to homepage or examples page

assertions.issues: Cannot reliably test hover/focus states due to routing/navigation issues. Page state becomes inconsistent after interactions, frequently redirecting to /examples or homepage.

steps.action: Navigate to course map and measure load time
steps.observed: Page loads and becomes interactive quickly
All 10 lectures display correctly

frictions.description: Routing inconsistency - /course-map sometimes renders course map, sometimes renders examples page
frictions.resolution: Navigating via 'Explore Course Map' link from homepage works, but direct URL access often fails

frictions.description: Hash-based routing (/#/course-map) redirects to homepage instead of course map
Search overlay triggers unexpectedly when attempting hover on lecture cards
frictions.resolution: Could not resolve - page state becomes unstable

frictions.description: Clicking lecture cards navigates to /examples instead of lecture detail
frictions.resolution: Not resolved - appears to be a routing bug

frictions.description: Lecture pages render minimal content - no lecture body, only navigation elements
frictions.resolution: Not resolved - lecture content not loading from data source

blockers.description: Lecture content does not render - /lecture/lecture-01 and /lecture/2 pages show minimal UI without lecture body content. The lecture data from course-map.json is not being loaded/displayed.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried multiple URL patterns (/lecture/lecture-01, /lecture/1, /lecture/2), cleared cache, re-navigated. Content still not rendering.

blockers.description: CORS errors for file:// CSS/JS assets - may indicate improper asset loading configuration
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Not blocking page load, but may cause issues in some environments

summary: Tested 18 assertions (P2-NAV-001-010 and P2-LEC-001-008). Course Map (P2-NAV) partially working: 10 lectures display correctly with titles, topics, and exam relevance indicators. Responsive layouts (mobile/desktop) and light/dark modes work. However, clicking lecture cards does not navigate to lecture detail pages (bug). Lecture Reader (P2-LEC) is blocked - lecture pages render minimal content without the actual lecture body. 8 of 18 assertions pass, 10 fail.
